trust.rutInfo: RUT tax deduction applies — save 50% on eligible services.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: Professional cleaning services for homes and businesses across Sweden.

homeCleaning.name: Home Cleaning
homeCleaning.description: For a happier home. Let us take care of the cleaning so you can focus on life.

deepCleaning.name: Deep Cleaning
deepCleaning.description: A thorough clean that gives your home a fresh start.

windowCleaning.name: Window Cleaning
windowCleaning.description: Let the light into your home with professional window cleaning.

moveOutCleaning.name: Move-Out Cleaning

officeCleaning.name: Office Cleaning

homeCleaning.intro:
Do you long for more time for what really matters? Let Härlig Städ AB take care of the cleaning so you can focus on life. We create order and harmony with a personal touch – for a happier home.

Coming home to a freshly cleaned house is one of life's greatest everyday luxuries. The scent of freshly scrubbed floors, the gleaming surfaces in the bathroom, and the peace of mind that comes when you don't have to think about vacuuming and dishes. At Härlig Städ AB, we know that a clean home isn't just about hygiene – it's about well-being, harmony, and more quality time with family and friends.

whyChooseUs.title: Personal service
whyChooseUs.desc: We strive to send the same cleaner to your home every time. This builds trust and a cleaning routine tailored exactly to your needs.

whyChooseUs.title: Trust & Quality
whyChooseUs.desc: We are a serious cleaning company with trained staff, fair conditions, and liability insurance. You can feel completely secure when you hand over your keys to us.

whyChooseUs.title: Sustainable choices
whyChooseUs.desc: We care about both your home environment and nature. That's why we use eco-friendly cleaning methods and gentle products.

whyChooseUs.title: No commitment period
whyChooseUs.desc: We want you to stay with us because you're satisfied, not because you're locked into a contract. With us, you always have full flexibility.

includesAllRooms: Spot cleaning doors, frames, and light switches
includesKitchen: Exterior wiping of exhaust fan, fridge, and freezer

howItWorks.title: Free consultation
howItWorks.desc: We start with a visit (or phone call) where we go through your home and what you need help with.

howItWorks.title: Tailored schedule
howItWorks.desc: You choose how often we come – every week, every other week, or every four weeks.

howItWorks.title: Enjoy your happier home
howItWorks.desc: We take care of the rest. You receive the invoice after the work is done, with the 50% RUT deduction already applied.

homeCleaning.rutSection: As a private individual, you only pay half the labour cost directly on the invoice. We handle all the administration with the Swedish Tax Agency for you. It has never been more affordable to get help at home!

deepCleaning.intro: A deep clean that gives your home a fresh start — ideal before holidays, parties, or simply for everyday luxury. We go beyond the surface to make every corner shine.
includes: Perfect for spring cleaning or special occasions

windowCleaning.intro:
Few things make as big a difference for cosiness at home as freshly cleaned windows. With Härlig Städ AB's professional window cleaning, you get a clearer view and a brighter room – a simple path to a happier home.

Many people put off cleaning their windows. It requires the right technique, the right equipment, and often a great deal of time and patience. Why not let our experts handle the job? We clean everything from small mullioned windows to large glazed balconies and tall sections, always with a streak-free and sparkling result.

whyChooseUs.title: Streak-free results
whyChooseUs.desc: We use professional tools and techniques that leave your windows perfectly clean, without streaks or smudges.

whyChooseUs.title: We see the whole picture
whyChooseUs.desc: We naturally wipe down window frames and sills so the entire window area looks like new.

whyChooseUs.title: Safety first
whyChooseUs.desc: We are experienced working on ladders and with special equipment, so you don't have to balance at dangerous heights.

whyChooseUs.title: Flexible & Easy
whyChooseUs.desc: Book window cleaning as a one-time service before spring, or combine it with your regular home cleaning.

includes: All sides cleaned: We clean all sides of the window (2-pane or 4-sided for triple-glazed) unless otherwise agreed.
Frame cleaning: We wipe down window frames and sills to remove dirt and cobwebs.
Glazed areas: We also clean glazed balconies and conservatories, which often require extra care.
Materials included: We bring all materials and eco-friendly cleaning products needed.

howItWorks.title: Quote
howItWorks.desc: Contact us and tell us how many windows you have (and whether they are reversible, have mullions, or if you have a glazed balcony).

howItWorks.title: Cleaning
howItWorks.desc: We arrive at the scheduled time. You just need to make sure the windows are easily accessible (please move flowers and curtains before we arrive).

howItWorks.title: Enjoy the view
howItWorks.desc: We leave your home brighter than when we arrived. You pay conveniently by invoice with a 50% RUT deduction.

windowCleaning.rutSection: Window cleaning qualifies as a household service, which means you as a private individual get a 50% discount on the labour cost. We handle all contact with the Swedish Tax Agency and the deduction is applied directly to your invoice.
windowCleaning.tip: Book your window cleaning before the first rays of spring sunshine or before the Advent candlesticks go up – it makes an enormous difference to the feeling in the room!
windowCleaning.pricing: From 75 kr/window — get a quote for your home

moveOutCleaning.intro: When the moving truck has left, your energy is often spent. Let Härlig Städ AB take care of the last, heavy part. We make sure your old home is spotlessly clean for the next owner, so you can focus entirely on your new chapter.

whyChooseUs.title: Window cleaning always included
whyChooseUs.desc: We clean all sides of the window panes as standard.

whyChooseUs.title: 7-day cleaning guarantee
whyChooseUs.desc: We clean until it's approved. If anything is noted during the inspection, we fix it immediately.

whyChooseUs.title: All materials included
whyChooseUs.desc: We bring all machines and eco-friendly cleaning products.

whyChooseUs.title: Safe & Insured
whyChooseUs.desc: Your home is in safe hands. We carry liability insurance and work with a focus on quality.

whyChooseUs.title: RUT tax deduction
whyChooseUs.desc: You only pay 50% of the labour cost directly on the invoice.

moveOutCleaning.includesIntro: We follow the industry standard for move-out cleaning to guarantee a result approved by landlords and estate agents.
includesAllRooms: Vacuuming and wet wiping of floors
Cleaning all sides of windows, plus wiping frames and sills
Wiping doors, frames, door handles, power outlets, and light switches
Inside and outside wiping of wardrobes, cabinets, and drawers
includesKitchen: Stove & Oven: Thorough cleaning of oven, grates, and trays. We also clean behind the stove if pulled out.
Fridge & Freezer: Cleaning inside and out, including underneath (freezer must be defrosted).
Exhaust fan: Cleaning of fan and filter (not carbon filters).
Dishwasher: Cleaning inside and out, including the filter.
Surfaces: Wiping tiles, countertops, and cabinet fronts. Polishing sink and mixer tap.
includesBathroom: Sanitary: Cleaning toilet, sink, faucets, and shower/bathtub.
Floor drain: Cleaning of floor drain (interior).
Appliances: Exterior cleaning of washing machine and tumble dryer, plus lint filter cleaning.

customerChecklist.title: Empty the home completely
customerChecklist.desc: The home must be empty of furniture and personal belongings. If furniture remains, we only clean the surfaces we can reach, and we do not move heavy objects for workplace safety reasons.

customerChecklist.title: Electricity and water
customerChecklist.desc: Make sure there is access to both electricity and hot water in the home. Without lighting and hot water, we cannot guarantee a satisfactory result, especially during the winter months.

customerChecklist.title: Fridge and freezer
customerChecklist.desc: If you have booked cleaning of the fridge and freezer, these must be emptied and defrosted before cleaning begins. Remember to leave the doors open after defrosting so they have time to dry.

customerChecklist.title: Pull out appliances
customerChecklist.desc: If you want us to clean behind the stove, fridge, freezer, or washing machine, you need to pull these out yourself. We do not move machines due to the risk of damage to floors or pipe connections.

customerChecklist.title: Existing damage
customerChecklist.desc: Please inform us in advance if there is existing damage in the home, such as scratched windows, broken outlets, or stains on walls that cannot be washed off.

customerChecklist.title: Key handling
customerChecklist.desc: Agree with us in good time on how we get access to the home. You can either meet us on site or leave keys at our office by arrangement.

moveOutCleaning.promise: Once you've checked off the list, we take over! We bring all materials, all machines, and our expertise to make your old home "härlig" (lovely) again.
includes: Complete checklist: all rooms, bathroom, kitchen
moveOutCleaning.pricing: From 3 500 kr for a standard apartment (before RUT)

officeCleaning.intro:
A clean and fresh workplace is the foundation of a good working environment. With Härlig Städ AB's professional office cleaning, we create the conditions for creativity, focus, and well-being. We take care of the cleaning – so you can focus on your business.

At Härlig Städ AB, we know that the office is more than just a workplace; it's a face towards customers and a safe haven for your employees. By investing in regular office cleaning, you reduce sick leave, increase well-being, and make a professional first impression. Our goal is simple: We want to contribute to a happier and more productive working life.

whyChooseUs.title: Tailored solutions
whyChooseUs.desc: Every office is unique. We create a cleaning schedule that fits your premises and working hours – whether you need cleaning every day or once a week.

whyChooseUs.title: Trust & Continuity
whyChooseUs.desc: We strive to have the same staff clean for you every time. This creates trust and a cleaner who gets to know your routines and preferences.

whyChooseUs.title: Sustainability in focus
whyChooseUs.desc: We use eco-labelled cleaning products and methods that are gentle on both the environment and those who spend time in the premises.

whyChooseUs.title: Collective agreement & Insurance
whyChooseUs.desc: As our customer, you can rest assured that our staff have fair conditions and that we have full insurance in case anything unexpected happens.

howItWorks.title: Needs assessment
howItWorks.desc: We make a free visit to your premises to understand your specific needs.

howItWorks.title: Quote & Plan
howItWorks.desc: We present a tailored quote with a fixed price per month or hour.

howItWorks.title: Ongoing follow-up
howItWorks.desc: We maintain a close dialogue to ensure you are always satisfied with the result.

officeCleaning.pricing: Custom pricing — contact us for a tailored quote

about.title: About Härlig Städ AB
about.intro: For nearly 30 years, we have offered first-class home services. Every day, we leverage that experience to meet, and exceed, our customers' expectations.
about.storyP1: What started as a small family business has grown into one of the most trusted cleaning service providers in Sweden. Our passion for cleanliness and customer care drives everything we do.
about.storyP2: We believe that a clean home or office isn't a luxury — it's a foundation for well-being. That's why we go above and beyond to deliver results that make you smile when you walk through the door.
about.why1Desc: Decades of expertise in home and office cleaning across Sweden.
about.why2Desc: Save 50% on eligible services. We handle the application — no extra steps for you.
about.why3Desc: For move-out cleaning, if you're not happy, we'll come back and fix it at no extra cost.
about.why4Desc: Every team member is meticulously selected and trained to the highest standards.
about.ctaBannerSubtitle: Book your cleaning today — no payment required upfront.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This page describes how we process personal data when you use our website and forms. Replace this text with your final policy (and have it reviewed legally if needed).
privacy.dataBody: When you submit the quote or booking form, we store the information you provide so we can respond and deliver our services. Data may be stored in our systems (for example a spreadsheet) and used to contact you about your request.
privacy.contactBody: If you have questions about privacy or want to exercise your rights, contact us using the details on our contact page.

rut.a: RUT allows you to get a 50% tax reduction on eligible cleaning services. You must be 18+, pay tax in Sweden. We handle the application when you book — no extra steps for you.

guarantee.a: For move-out cleaning, we offer a 7-day guarantee. If you or the buyer aren't satisfied, we'll come back and fix it at no extra cost.

preparation.q: How should I prepare for a cleaning?
preparation.a: For move-out: empty the home, pull out appliances if needed, defrost the freezer. For window cleaning: move furniture, remove curtains, have keys ready for locked windows.

pricing.a: Pricing depends on service type, home size, and any extras (e.g. window count, spröjs). Get a quote via our booking form or contact us directly.

booking.a: Fill in our booking form online. We'll call you within 24 hours to confirm the date, time, and details. No payment is required upfront.

cancel.a: Yes, you can cancel or reschedule your booking by contacting us at least 24 hours before the scheduled time.
